title: Pink Shuts Down ‘Fake’ Reports That She & Husband Carey Hart Separated: ‘Trash News’
summary: "I was just alerted to the fact that I'm separated from my husband -- I didn't know," the singer quips in a new video.
body: Pink just shut down “fake news” reports that she Carey Hart separated after 20 years of marriage, sharing a cheeky video of herself walking around in her kitchen poking fun at the headlines. “I was just alerted to the fact that I’m separated from my husband — I didn’t know,” she quips sarcastically at the beginning of the clip posted Thursday (Feb. 26) on Instagram , sticking her tongue out. “Thank you for letting me know. I was wondering, would you also like to tell our children?” Related P!nk Reveals Why She Spent New Year’s Eve in a Hospital Bed: ‘This Year Was a Doozy’ P!nk Celebrates 19 Years of Marriage to Carey Hart: ‘You Have Loved Me, Hated Me & Loved Me Again’ Here’s What Carey Hart Thinks About P!nk Writing Songs About Him “Do you wanna talk about some real news?” she continues, pointing out that the Epstein files, systemic racism and the standout feats of female athletes at this years Olympics. “Or do you wanna talk about the fact that I got nominated the first year I was eligible for the Rock & Roll motherf—in’ Hall of Fame?” T…
